title: Words I Never Said — A Love Letter That Waited 50 Years
description:
In 1994, a woman opens her grandfather's pocket watch and finds a love letter hidden inside — written on the night before D-Day, 1944. He survived the war. He came home. He married someone else. But he never sent the letter.

Why?

This is the story of two people separated by war, bound by a promise, and reunited by a granddaughter who refused to let the silence win.
